rationale: Keep: the citing paper develops customer-level optimal advertising/microtargeting policies across media, while the cited paper explicitly develops a dynamic decision support system for customer-time-specific optimal email contact frequency; this is a strong conceptual/methodological overlap in dynamic contact optimization.
